idea-plugin.name: DLMS Translator
idea-plugin.description:
DLMS Translator is an essential tool for developers and engineers working with Smart Meters and the DLMS/COSEM protocol.

This plugin allows you to instantly translate DLMS frames (hexadecimal or Base64) directly inside your IDE into a clean, formatted, and readable XML structure, saving you time from using external tools.


Key Features:
  • PDU Translation: Decode Protocol Data Units (AARQ, AARE, get-request, etc.) seamlessly.
  • Multiple Input Formats: Supports both hexadecimal and Base64 encoded DLMS frames.
  • Native UI: A beautifully integrated Tool Window that respects your IDE's Dark/Light themes and font settings.

Powered by the open-source Gurux DLMS Java library.
